response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and experience with geospatial projects (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), but lacks direct experience with modern C++ or Rust in routing/tiling pipelines, distributed systems at scale, or real-time traffic integration. Their expertise in web/mobile/embedded systems and languages like TypeScript and Dlang does not align closely with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and low-latency systems
Proven ability to work across full technical stacks and learn new technologies quickly
Strong problem-solving skills and commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or Rust for routing/tiling pipelines
Limited exposure to distributed systems concepts at the scale required for global routing data
No demonstrated experience with real-time traffic signals or navigation guidance systems
